allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /git|linkedin|twitter|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^\(Github|Linkedin|Twitter|LinkedinIcon|GithubIcon\)/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,20\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && !k.startsWith\('create'\) && k.length < 12\); console.log\(names.filter\(k => /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,80\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\)\); const social = names.filter\(k => /link|external|globe|share|user|profile/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(social.slice\(0,20\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; h=d['State']['Health']; print\('Status:', h['Status']\); [print\(l['Output'][:200]\) for l in h['Log'][-3:]]")
